name: stepfun-tts
description: Generate Chinese / Japanese speech with StepFun's stepaudio-2.5-tts — Contextual TTS that replaces step-tts-2's `voice_label` with natural-language `instruction` (≤200 chars) plus inline `()` parentheses for句内 prosody. Use when the user wants emotional / prosody control over voice synthesis (whisper, pause, stress, mood pivot mid-sentence), batch-generates game / app voice lines, migrates from `step-tts-2` (the `voice_label → instruction` breaking change), or hits StepFun's stricter 2.5-era cens
author: daymade
